protocol_lineage.correction_summary: PX1-M03 remediation protocol after PX1-M02 closed with no-candidate-selected; reuses PX1-M02 v2 opponent fixtures with burnysc2_policy px1_m03_hybrid_v1 for hybrid Terran live surface + M43-throttled combat.
protocol_lineage.supersedes_play_quality_only: PX1-M02 protocol profile addresses demo-candidate selection; PX1-M03 addresses demo-readiness remediation before PX1-M04.

candidate_pool.pool_description: Same primary candidate as PX1-M01/PX1-M02; PX1-M03 enriches live action surface only — no new candidate id.
candidate_pool.notes: Enriched/remediated bounded hybrid live surface under PX1-M03; not a new training lineage.

opponent_profiles.non_claim: PX1-M02 v2 parameters (seed/horizon/replay) + burnysc2_policy px1_m03_hybrid_v1 for hybrid live surface.
PX1-M02 v2 parameters (distinct seed) + burnysc2_policy px1_m03_hybrid_v1 for hybrid live surface.

frozen_parameters.selection_rule: demo-readiness: choose candidate only if frozen win/evidence thresholds met and live proof shows required early-game action-family diversity per runtime doc; else no-demo-ready-candidate-within-scope

non_claims: PX1-M03 is corrective remediation after PX1-M02 no-candidate-selected — not a new industrial campaign.
